On this page

Disable storage level data deduplication on inserts

## Syntax[​](#syntax "Direct link to Syntax")

![Flow chart showing the syntax of the ALTER TABLE DISABLE DEDUP statement](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

## Example[​](#example "Direct link to Example")

Disable deduplication on table `TICKER_PRICE`:

```prism-code
ALTER TABLE TICKER_PRICE DEDUP DISABLE
```

See more example at [data deduplication](/docs/concepts/deduplication/#quick-example)
page
